lines.speaker: You
lines.text: You are an illuminator, tasked with decorating the margins of a prayerbook. You have been commissioned to copy the work from another prayerbook, and must match the marginalia from your reference.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: If you fail to match the reference, you will be given another chance to try again. Correctly decorate your prayerbook to earn Trust Points.

lines.speaker: You
lines.text: Trust Points signify that you are a skiled illuminator. Use your Trust Points to unlock artifacts and read about their history.
